---
title: "Size vs. Bd modeling: Panamá preliminary results"
author: Cob Staines
date: 2025-09-29
format:
  html:
    toc: true
df-print: kable
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ecology.csl
---
# Setup

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse,  RPostgres, DBI, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr, dbplyr, janitor, here, brms, cmdstanr, tidybayes, patchwork)

```

# Data selection

## environmental
```{r}
env_agg = read_csv(here("data", "unified_env_agg.csv"))

```

## RACA
```{r}
raca_raw = read.csv(here("data", "JPSL_RACA_Swabbed_Individuals_2026-03-03.csv")) %>%
  clean_names()

met_med = raca_raw %>%
  filter(life_stage == "M",
         !is.na(svl_mm)) %>%
  summarize(mm = median(svl_mm))

raca_clean = raca_raw %>%
  filter(life_stage %in% c("A", "S", "Y", "M")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(site = site_name,
         body_mass_g = weight_g,
         site_utme = utme_site,
         site_utmn = utmn_site,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab = bd_swab_results_its) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         life_stage_simple = case_when(
           life_stage == "M" ~ "metamorph",
           svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
           svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult"),
         svl_mm = if_else(life_stage_simple == "metamorph" & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         site = tolower(gsub(" ", "_", site)),
         site_utm_zone = 11,  # verify
         population = site,
         region = "W",
         country = "usa",
         project = "RACA",
         taxon_capture = "rana_cascadae") %>%
  filter(!is.na(bd_its1_copies_per_swab))

raca_valid = raca_clean %>%
  select(taxon_capture,
         date,
         site,
         population,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         life_stage_simple,
         life_stage,
         sex,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         region,
         country,
         project)
```

# RAMU/RASI
```{r}
## Connect to DB
dbcon = hopToDB("ribbitr", hopReg = FALSE)

# table pointers
db_bd = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "bd_qpcr_results"))
db_sample = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "sample"))
db_capture = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "capture"))
db_survey = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "survey"))
db_visit = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "visit"))
db_site = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "site"))
db_region = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "region"))
db_country = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "country"))

# preliminary data
bd_sample = db_sample %>%
  right_join(db_capture, by = "capture_id") %>%
  left_join(db_survey, by = "survey_id") %>%
  left_join(db_visit, by = "visit_id") %>%
  left_join(db_site, by = "site_id") %>%
  left_join(db_region, by = "region_id") %>%
  left_join(db_country, by = "country_id") %>%
  filter(sample_type == "bd",
         taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa",
                              "rana_sierrae")) %>%
  inner_join(db_bd %>%
              filter(!is.na(bd_detected)) %>%
              group_by(sample_id) %>%
              slice_sample(n = 1) %>%
              ungroup() %>%
              select(sample_id,
                     bd_its1_copies_per_swab), by = "sample_id")

# load populations
site_year_pop = read.csv(here("data", "sn_resilience_trajectory_classification_pop_lookup_2026-02-28.csv")) %>%
  mutate(site = as.character(site))

# define life stage simple
bd_life_stage = bd_sample %>%
  filter(life_stage %in% c("adult",
                           "subadult",
                           NA) |
           tad_stage >= 44) %>%
  mutate(svl_mm = if_else(!is.na(tad_stage) & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         life_stage_simple = case_when(
           !is.na(tad_stage) | svl_mm < 30 ~ "metamorph",
           (svl_mm >= 40) ~ "adult",
           (svl_mm < 40) ~ "subadult",
           .default = NA),
         svl_mm = if_else(life_stage_simple == "metamorph" & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         year = year(date)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_stage_simple))

ranarasi_valid = bd_life_stage %>%
  filter(site %in% site_year_pop$site) %>%
  select(sample_id,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         sample_name,
         capture_id,
         taxon_capture,
         life_stage,
         tad_stage,
         life_stage_simple,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         sex,
         date,
         year,
         site,
         site_id,
         region,
         country) %>%
  collect() %>%
  left_join(site_year_pop, by = c("site", "year")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bd_its1_copies_per_swab)) %>%
  mutate(project = "MLRG")


```

# Combine data
```{r}
col_compare = compare_df_cols(ranarasi_valid,
                              raca_valid)

brms_data = bind_rows(ranarasi_valid,
                      raca_valid) %>%
  left_join(env_agg %>%
              select(date,
                     site,
                     precip_mm_30_day_sum,
                     temp_c_30_day_mean), by = c("site", "date")) %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = factor(life_stage_simple, levels = c("metamorph", "subadult", "adult")),
         is_metamorph = as.numeric(life_stage_simple == "metamorph"),
         is_not_metamorph = as.numeric(life_stage_simple != "metamorph"),
         bd_load_co = if_else(bd_its1_copies_per_swab < 10,
                              0,
                              bd_its1_copies_per_swab),
         bd_detected_co = bd_load_co > 0,
         bd_load_co_density = bd_load_co / svl_mm) %>%
  mutate(
    precip_mm_30_z = as.numeric(scale(precip_mm_30_day_sum, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    temp_c_30_z = as.numeric(scale(temp_c_30_day_mean, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    precip_mm_30_z2 = as.numeric(scale(precip_mm_30_day_sum ^ 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    temp_c_30_z2 = as.numeric(scale(temp_c_30_day_mean ^ 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)))

# check for good alignment with environmental data
env_alignment_check = any(is.na(brms_data$precip_mm_30_day_sum)) | any(is.na(brms_data$temp_c_30_day_mean))

save(brms_data, file = here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", paste0("brms_data_gam_", today(), ".RData")))

peace = brms_data %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture) %>%
  count()

ggplot(brms_data, aes(x = svl_mm, color = life_stage_simple)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap("taxon_capture")

```

# Modeling
## Model setup
```{r}

load(here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", "brms_data_gam_2026-04-01.RData"))

raca_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae")
ramu_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_muscosa",
         svl_mm >= 20)
rasi_data = brms_data %>%
  filter(taxon_capture == "rana_sierrae",
         svl_mm >= 20)

set_cmdstan_path(Sys.getenv("cmd_stan_path"))
```

## Model fitting
```{r}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show model fitting code"

# null model
null_zln <- brm(
  bd_load_co_density ~ 1,
  data = brms_data,
  family = hurdle_lognormal(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed = 124,
  cores = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

null_zln <- add_criterion(null_zln, "loo")

saveRDS(null_zln, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_null.rds"))
null_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_null.rds"))

# m1_zln <- brm(
#   formula  =  bf(
#     bd_load_co_density ~ s(svl_mm, by = taxon_capture) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture),
#     hu ~ s(svl_mm, by = taxon_capture) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture),
#     sigma ~ 1 + taxon_capture +  (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture)
#   ),
#   data     = brms_data,
#   family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
#   control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
#   chains   = 4,
#   iter     = 2000,
#   warmup   = 1000,
#   seed     = 124,
#   cores    = 4,
#   backend = "cmdstanr"
# )
# 
# m1_zln <- add_criterion(m1_zln, "loo")
# 
# saveRDS(m1_zln, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m1.rds"))
# m1_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m1.rds"))

# RACA
m2_formula = bf(
    bd_load_co_density ~ is_metamorph + s(svl_mm, by = is_not_metamorph) + (1 | population) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2),
    hu ~  is_metamorph + s(svl_mm, by = is_not_metamorph) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2),
    sigma ~ 1 +  (1 | population) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2)
  )

m2_zln_raca <- brm(
  formula  =  m2_formula,
  data     = raca_data,
  family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
  seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m2_zln_raca <- add_criterion(m2_zln_raca, "loo")

saveRDS(m2_zln_raca, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_raca.rds"))
m2_zln_raca = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_raca.rds"))

# RAMU
m2_zln_ramu <- brm(
  formula  =  m2_formula,
  data     = ramu_data,
  family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
  seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m2_zln_ramu <- add_criterion(m2_zln_ramu, "loo")

saveRDS(m2_zln_ramu, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_ramu.rds"))
m2_zln_ramu = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_ramu.rds"))

# RASI
m2_zln_rasi <- brm(
  formula  =  m2_formula,
  data     = rasi_data,
  family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000,
  seed = 124, cores = 4, backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m2_zln_rasi <- add_criterion(m2_zln_rasi, "loo")

saveRDS(m2_zln_rasi, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_rasi.rds"))
m2_zln_rasi = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m2_rasi.rds"))



```

# visualize results

## including metamophs
```{r}
model_select = m2_zln_ramu
adult_cutoff_mm = 40

# non-metamorph: vary svl_mm, smooth is active
nd_notmet <- tibble(
  svl_mm          = seq(min(raca_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
                        max(raca_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),
                        length.out = 200),
  is_metamorph    = 0,
  is_not_metamorph = 1,
  precip_mm_30_z  = 0, precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
  temp_c_30_z     = 0, temp_c_30_z2    = 0
)

# metamorph: svl_mm is irrelevant (smooth is off), use a dummy value
nd_met <- tibble(
  svl_mm           = mean(raca_data$svl_mm, na.rm = TRUE),  # doesn't matter
  is_metamorph     = 1,
  is_not_metamorph = 0,
  precip_mm_30_z   = 0, precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
  temp_c_30_z      = 0, temp_c_30_z2    = 0
)

# non-metamorph
hu_notmet   <- nd_notmet |> add_epred_draws(model_select, dpar = "hu",  re_formula = NA)
mu_notmet   <- nd_notmet |> add_epred_draws(model_select, dpar = "mu",  re_formula = NA)

# metamorph — keep all draws for boxplot distribution
hu_met      <- nd_met    |> add_epred_draws(model_select, dpar = "hu",  re_formula = NA)
mu_met      <- nd_met    |> add_epred_draws(model_select, dpar = "mu",  re_formula = NA)

# non-metamorph: median + interval over svl sequence
prev_notmet_agg <- hu_notmet |>
  mutate(prevalence = 1 - plogis(hu)) |>    # adjust if hu is already on prob scale
  group_by(svl_mm) |>
  median_qi(prevalence, .width = 0.89)

mu_notmet_agg <- mu_notmet |>
  group_by(svl_mm) |>
  median_qi(mu, .width = 0.89)

# metamorph: keep raw draws for boxplot
prev_met_draws <- hu_met |>
  mutate(prevalence = 1 - plogis(hu))

mu_met_draws <- mu_met

# --- prevalence ---
p_prev_met <- ggplot(prev_met_draws, aes(x = "metamorph", y = prevalence)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#8DA0CB", alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Bd Prevalence") +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_classic()

p_prev_notmet <- ggplot(prev_notmet_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, y = prevalence)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), fill = "#8DA0CB", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(color = "#8DA0CB", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = adult_cutoff_mm, linetype = "dashed", color = "#666") +
  labs(x = "SVL (mm)", y = NULL) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y  = element_blank()
  )

p_prev <- p_prev_met + p_prev_notmet +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 3)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Smooth + fixed effect on Bd prevalence")

# --- mu ---
# get shared y range first
mu_ylim <- range(c(mu_notmet_agg$.lower, mu_notmet_agg$.upper))

p_mu_met <- ggplot(mu_met_draws, aes(x = "metamorph", y = mu)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#FC8D62", alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "log(Bd load)") +
  ylim(mu_ylim) +
  theme_classic()

p_mu_notmet <- ggplot(mu_notmet_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, y = mu)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), fill = "#FC8D62", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(color = "#FC8D62", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = adult_cutoff_mm, linetype = "dashed", color = "#666") +
  labs(x = "Post-metamorphic SVL (mm)", y = NULL) +
  ylim(mu_ylim) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y  = element_blank()
  )

p_mu <- p_mu_met + p_mu_notmet +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 3)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Smooth + fixed effect on Bd load")

p_prev
p_mu

```

## post-metamophic
```{r}

svl_df = brms_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(svl_mm)) %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture) %>%
  reframe(svl_mm = seq(20, 75, length.out = 200)) %>%
  mutate(precip_mm_30_z = 0,
         precip_mm_30_z2 = 0,
         temp_c_30_z = 0,
         temp_c_30_z2 = 0)

# epred draws
hu_draws = svl_df %>%
  add_epred_draws(m1_zln, dpar = "hu", re_formula = NA)

mu_draws = svl_df %>%
  add_epred_draws(m1_zln, dpar = "mu", re_formula = NA)

sigma_draws = svl_df %>%
  add_linpred_draws(m1_zln, dpar = "sigma", re_formula = NA)

epred_drawss = svl_df %>%
  add_epred_draws(m1_zln, re_formula = NA)

# agg
hu_agg = hu_draws %>%
  group_by(svl_mm, taxon_capture) %>%
  median_qi(hu, .width = c(0.89))

prev_agg = hu_draws %>%
  mutate(prevalence = 1 - plogis(hu)) %>%
  group_by(svl_mm, taxon_capture) %>%
  median_qi(prevalence, .width = c(0.89))

mu_agg = mu_draws %>%
  group_by(svl_mm, taxon_capture) %>%
  median_qi(mu, .width = c(0.89))

ggplot(hu_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, color = taxon_capture, fill = taxon_capture)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = hu), linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Smooth effect on Bd prevalence",
       x = "SVL (mm)", y = "Bd Prevalence") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")

ggplot(prev_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, color = taxon_capture, fill = taxon_capture)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = prevalence), linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Smooth effect on Bd prevalence",
       x = "SVL (mm)", y = "Bd Prevalence") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  ylim(0, 1)

ggplot(mu_agg, aes(x = svl_mm, color = taxon_capture, fill = taxon_capture)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .lower, ymax = .upper), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mu), linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Smooth effect on Bd load",
       x = "SVL (mm)", y = "log(Bd load)") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")



```

# Recreate groups
```{r}
hu_draws_groups = hu_draws %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = case_when(
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm >= 40 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm < 40 ~ "subadult"
  ))

mu_draws_groups = mu_draws %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = case_when(
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture == "rana_cascadae" & svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm >= 40 ~ "adult",
    taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa", "rana_sierrae") & svl_mm < 40 ~ "subadult"
  ))

hu_groups_agg = hu_draws_groups %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture, life_stage_simple) %>%
  median_qi(hu, .width = c(.89))

mu_groups_agg = mu_draws_groups %>%
  group_by(taxon_capture, life_stage_simple) %>%
  median_qi(mu, .width = c(.89))


```
